## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run build`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials are committed.
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in `.env.example`.
- [ ] User input boundaries are validated or explicitly deferred.
- [ ] No `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` or unsafe dynamic HTML is introduced.
- [ ] Accessibility-impacting changes preserve keyboard and focus behavior.

## Review

- [ ] CODEOWNERS review requested from `@ParkPawapon`.
- [ ] All review threads are resolved before merge.
